## Problem or use case

<!-- What are you trying to do? What's missing or hard today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe your ideal solution. If you have a specific CLI surface in mind, include it. -->

```bash
design-intel <proposed-command> --flag <value>
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other tools that do this? -->

## Additional context
